mapper.select: SELECT f.*, da.code as departureAirportCode, da.name as departureAirportName, da.city as departureCity, aa.code as arrivalAirportCode, aa.name as arrivalAirportName, aa.city as arrivalCity, al.code as airlineCode, al.name as airlineName, al.logo_url as airlineLogoUrl FROM flights f LEFT JOIN airports da ON f.departure_airport_id = da.id LEFT JOIN airports aa ON f.arrival_airport_id = aa.id LEFT JOIN airlines al ON f.airline_id = al.id

SELECT f.*, da.code AS departureAirportCode, da.name AS departureAirportName, da.city AS departureCity, aa.code AS arrivalAirportCode, aa.name AS arrivalAirportName, aa.city AS arrivalCity, al.code AS airlineCode, al.name AS airlineName, al.logo_url AS airlineLogoUrl FROM flights f LEFT JOIN airports da ON f.departure_airport_id = da.id LEFT JOIN airports aa ON f.arrival_airport_id = aa.id LEFT JOIN airlines al ON f.airline_id = al.id WHERE (TRIM(LOWER(da.city)) = TRIM(LOWER(#{departureCity})) OR TRIM(UPPER(da.code)) = TRIM(UPPER(#{departureCity}))) AND (TRIM(LOWER(aa.city)) = TRIM(LOWER(#{arrivalCity})) OR TRIM(UPPER(aa.code)) = TRIM(UPPER(#{arrivalCity}))) AND ( DATE(CONVERT_TZ(f.departure_time, '+00:00', '+08:00')) = #{departureDate} OR DATE(f.departure_time) = #{departureDate} OR DATE(DATE_ADD(f.departure_time, INTERVAL 8 HOUR)) = #{departureDate} ) AND f.departure_time > NOW() AND f.status != 'CANCELLED' ORDER BY f.departure_time ASC

SELECT f.*, da.code AS departureAirportCode, da.name AS departureAirportName, da.city AS departureCity, aa.code AS arrivalAirportCode, aa.name AS arrivalAirportName, aa.city AS arrivalCity, al.code AS airlineCode, al.name AS airlineName, al.logo_url AS airlineLogoUrl FROM flights f LEFT JOIN airports da ON f.departure_airport_id = da.id LEFT JOIN airports aa ON f.arrival_airport_id = aa.id LEFT JOIN airlines al ON f.airline_id = al.id WHERE (TRIM(LOWER(da.city)) = TRIM(LOWER(#{departureCity})) OR TRIM(UPPER(da.code)) = TRIM(UPPER(#{departureCity}))) AND DATE(CONVERT_TZ(f.departure_time, '+00:00', '+08:00')) = #{departureDate} ORDER BY f.departure_time ASC

SELECT f.*, da.code AS departureAirportCode, da.name AS departureAirportName, da.city AS departureCity, aa.code AS arrivalAirportCode, aa.name AS arrivalAirportName, aa.city AS arrivalCity, al.code AS airlineCode, al.name AS airlineName, al.logo_url AS airlineLogoUrl FROM flights f LEFT JOIN airports da ON f.departure_airport_id = da.id LEFT JOIN airports aa ON f.arrival_airport_id = aa.id LEFT JOIN airlines al ON f.airline_id = al.id WHERE (TRIM(LOWER(aa.city)) = TRIM(LOWER(#{arrivalCity})) OR TRIM(UPPER(aa.code)) = TRIM(UPPER(#{arrivalCity}))) AND DATE(CONVERT_TZ(f.departure_time, '+00:00', '+08:00')) = #{departureDate} AND f.departure_time >= #{earliestDepartureTime} ORDER BY f.departure_time ASC

SELECT f.*, da.code AS departureAirportCode, da.name AS departureAirportName, da.city AS departureCity, aa.code AS arrivalAirportCode, aa.name AS arrivalAirportName, aa.city AS arrivalCity, al.code AS airlineCode, al.name AS airlineName, al.logo_url AS airlineLogoUrl FROM flights f LEFT JOIN airports da ON f.departure_airport_id = da.id LEFT JOIN airports aa ON f.arrival_airport_id = aa.id LEFT JOIN airlines al ON f.airline_id = al.id WHERE (TRIM(LOWER(da.city)) = TRIM(LOWER(#{departureCity})) OR TRIM(UPPER(da.code)) = TRIM(UPPER(#{departureCity}))) AND (TRIM(LOWER(aa.city)) = TRIM(LOWER(#{arrivalCity})) OR TRIM(UPPER(aa.code)) = TRIM(UPPER(#{arrivalCity}))) AND DATE(CONVERT_TZ(f.departure_time, '+00:00', '+08:00')) = #{departureDate} AND f.departure_time >= #{earliestDepartureTime} ORDER BY f.departure_time ASC
